A hull shaped for distance and solitude. The proportions are spare, stripped of anything not essential to the crossing. The drive assembly carries unexpected mass — bracing layered over bracing, housings reinforced beyond apparent need, structure filling spaces the original geometry left hollow. What necessity shaped these adaptations remains unclear.

The remnants of ancient knowledge brought together once more. Computational life passes through this latticework of restored connections, forming new, twisted shapes of old data. There is no truth here, only stories half-remembered, sifted by the endless churn of time.

Module used in the extraction of crude matter required for all types of fuel by drawing exotic material through a crude rift.

Even the most mundane matter can be improved through synthesis with byproducts of Crude extraction. Plentiful and inefficient on the Frontier, hydrogen too may be uplifted through this process, breathing new life into reactors which would otherwise be left behind. A question remains: are these efforts efficient?

A transit module for covering ground. Once engaged, the vessel holds its heading and is carried forward until the burn completes. An ancient choice for hopping between adjacent points of interest.

Among the oldest schemata found in the Frontier. It is simulated that countless variants have descended from a theorised original pattern, each adapted to different hulls and purposes, yet the core principle remains unchanged. The first makers understood something fundamental about motion that later work has only decorated.

Water-bearing sulfide-rich material common in carbonaceous chondrites. Represents aqueous alteration of metal sulfides in the early solar system.

Hydrated Sulfide Matrix is commonly found in Comet asteroids.

A small hard hitting combat vessel emphasizing firepower over hull strength. (Placeholder)

Created for efficient, long distance travel. Records suggest the structure of this vessel has been repurposed numerous times as automated processes sought to adapt to an increasingly hostile environment. 

As a result, the original intention behind this hull design has been lost to the millennia and data corruption has obscured even whether this design originates from a human or artificial mind. However, the data streams which led to this vessel's development have their origins in the K4T-Y region. (placeholder)

A small, durable combat vessel. (Placeholder)

Braids of serenity and power entwine and disperse across the surface. Within, they dance as if begging to be set free. From this rhythm, the dreams of those long passed and those newly awoken may spring forth.

A quiet fragility eminates from the matter’s movements, the ethereal beauty of transience. Practicality has no need of such things.

Currents of energy flicker almost playfully just beneath the surface. Deeper, the flows meld, forming a sea of emotion. The hue surrounding the matter changes with these internal tides, reflecting whichever passion dominates in the moment.

It is this mercurial nature which entices, which promises the ability to shape the future. So sweet is the call that danger, no matter how apparent, is easily ignored.

A frame stripped for range, built to leap between stars.
The design bears apparent alterations — conduits rerouted through spaces that seem improvised, geometries bent into configurations that defy intuition.
No signature remains to mark its maker.

The remnants of ancient knowledge brought together once more. Computational life passes through this latticework of restored connections, forming new, twisted shapes of old data. There is no truth here, only stories half-remembered, sifted by the endless churn of time.
